channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: First light in Arch coming from Morning Lane is out., 15th March
item.description:
Light needs replacing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morning Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on Kenilworth Road, 15th March
item.description:
The pothole has been here for a few weeks and getting worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenilworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in the road, 15th March
item.description:
There is a dead fox in the road on Green Lane as you approach the bridge heading towards Eltham after Park View. Same side of the road as Park View. Please remove. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Baby goods dumped by resident on the pavement 9 The Closet, 15th March
item.description:
As above ange generally rubbish around bins etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cleaned three bags of litter from the shrubs, 15th March
item.description:
Not sure how that can be a private land but yeah, as always cleaned them for you ;)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car left untaxed, 15th March
item.description:
Car left Untaxed On drive Dirty

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kempt Street, Woolwich

item.title: Flytipping - junk parks, 15th March
item.description:

item.title: Abandoned moped, 15th March

item.title: Flytipping - furniture and junk, 15th March
item.description:
General flytipping in the area which I've stacked up in one corner for pickup. Various bits been here for weeks to months. Needs a big van due to size of furniture, however right alley so might need two people to carry down the alley.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glebe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clean the rd, 15th March
item.description:
Clean the rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lindsey Close, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree hanging over my back fence, 15th March
item.description:
A tree dangerously hanging over my back garden branches are falling off it in my garden I have two young children 5 and 3 my garden backs on to cray Meadows the tree is not even a meter from my back fence my neighbour next door and number two has reported this many times as well and she's elderly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ladbrooke Crescent, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping Litter, 15th March
item.description:
Someone left and tight the litter in front of the our house. We fed up having that kind situations around our houses. Do immediate act to sort this kind of problem for the future please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Vernon Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Net on the tree, 15th March
item.description:
I think the builders forgot to remove the net on the tree by VENERDI restaurant by Clifden Road. Can you please help? Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping issue continues unresolved. Notices Required, 15th March
item.description:
Further to ref: 9020744 on 01 Mar, 8985260 on 24 Feb, 8934082 on 16 Feb, 8914360 on 13 Feb, 8880708 on 10 Feb, 8849897 on 06 Feb, 8730739, 8676867, and 8682206, the issue of constant fly tipping, with black rubbish bags and other rubbish being left out in the communal pathway, continues unresolved week after week. This latest instance occurred sometime in the night of 14 Mar. Attention to this matter to stop it from happening continuously multiple times a week, is urgently needed. In fact the problem is worsening week after week, day after day. Please post no fly tipping notices on the estate and deliver notices to all properties.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Usual fly tipping, 15th March
item.description:
Usual fly tipping 115a Stoke Newington street do not have shared bins in there building

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12 inch pothole getting bigger, 15th March
item.description:
This started off as a small pothole, it has now increased in size and is getting deeper, the stones in the hole are now flying out when a car or van hits it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rippersley Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on front of gp surgery, 15th March
item.description:
Graffiti on front of gp surgery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 205, Walworth Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped since Friday 13th March 26, 15th March
item.description:
Once rubbish is dumped then others continue to dump more rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pathway on Cazenove Road, 15th March
item.description:
Rubbish is always left by this lamp post outside 5 Cazenove Road. The bags are not tied and random furniture is left here too. The rubbish is left here by residents outside of the official dumping times. Attracts pests and also the pathway is very narrow.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By planter on pedestrianised jjnctikn, 15th March
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load
